user edit self credentials.title: User edits own credentials
user edit self credentials.description: User "{{userName}}" edited their credentials. Name: "{{oldUserName}}" → "{{newUserName}}". Email: "{{oldUserEmail}}" → "{{newUserEmail}}".

change user global role.title: Change user global role
change user global role.description: Changed user ({{userName}} - {{userEmail}}) global role from "{{oldUserGlobalRole}}" to "{{newUserGlobalRole}}".

refresh invitation.title: Refresh invitation
refresh invitation.description: Invitation refreshed for user "{{email}}" with role "{{role}}".

delete invitation.title: Delete invitation
delete invitation.description: Invitation deleted for user "{{email}}" with role "{{role}}".

change actions permissions.title: Change action permissions
change actions permissions.description: Organization "{{organizationName}}" updated. Create permission: "{{oldCreatePermission}}" → "{{newCreatePermission}}". Invite permission: "{{oldInvitePermission}}" → "{{newInvitePermission}}".

edit organization permissions.title: Edit organization permissions
edit organization permissions.description: Organization "{{organizationName}}" updated. Create permission: "{{oldCreatePermission}}" → "{{newCreatePermission}}". Invite permission: "{{oldInvitePermission}}" → "{{newInvitePermission}}".

delete organization.title: Delete organization
delete organization.description: Deleted organization "{{name}}", including its projects, blueprints, files, and user memberships.

delete project.title: Deleted project
delete project.description: Deleted project "{{projectName}}", including its blueprints, files, and user memberships.

update blueprint section views.title: Saved new areas
update blueprint section views.description: Section views for blueprint "{{blueprintName}}" were updated.

ask for inference job.title: Started inference job
ask for inference job.description: New AI inference job started for blueprint "{{blueprintName}}" using models {{models}}.
